---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))

#| label: storm-plot
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# Process the data to count unique named storms per year
storms_per_year <- storms %>%
  filter(!is.na(name)) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(num_storms = n_distinct(name))

# Create the visualization
ggplot(storms_per_year, aes(x = year, y = num_storms)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkblue") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Named Storms per Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Unique Storms"
  )
